AssertionError: ❌ '검색어를 입력해주세요' 팝업이 표시되지 않음

 +  where False = is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed()
 +    where is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed = <src.pages.kurly_main_page.KurlyMainPage object at 0x7f28583ba050>.is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed
